title: liriope minor
intro: Liriope minor, also known as the lilyturf or monkey grass, is a low-growing, flowering plant native to East Asia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiviral effects. The health benefits of Liriope minor include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and boosting the immune system. Herbal preparations of Liriope minor, such as extracts and infusions, are used to treat various ailments, including fever, sore throats, and digestive issues.
